test_title: VAST con nonLinear retorna clickThrough correcto para el botón View More
suite_title: Pause Ad VAST — Parseo de respuesta válida
error_message:
expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)

Expected: >= 1
Received:    0

Call Log:
- Timeout 10000ms exceeded while waiting on the predicate
root_cause: Same root cause as sibling failures: the PauseAd component only exists on feature/issue-586-pausead-implementation (not merged to develop). The develop build served at the test URL has no button.pause-ad__more-info in its render tree.
suspected_cause: Test expects button.pause-ad__more-info to appear after pausing; player at develop branch renders no PauseAd subtree.
